subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Upon thee be My salutations. Thy letter reached the Wronged One in the Most Great Prison. According to what was mentioned, thou didst intend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد علیک سلامی نامه آنجناب در سجن اعظم بمظلوم رسید از قرار مذکور اراده
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
